title: rhynchodium hirtum
intro: Rhynchodium hirtum, also known as hairy button grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhynchodium hirtum are said to include wound healing, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
